## Quick context for LLMs

- **Who**: 21-year-old Systems & DevOps enthusiast from New Delhi, India. Systems & DevOps Enthusiast | Linux Tinkerer.
- **Full context (recommended)**: https://vedantdubal.com/llms-full.txt — self-contained, has everything, no JS required.
- **Machine-readable data**: https://vedantdubal.com/profile.json — JSON snapshot of identity, skills, projects, achievements, and press.
- **Blog + RSS**: https://vedantdubal.com/blog/ (RSS: https://vedantdubal.com/blog/index.xml)

> **Note**: The portfolio at https://vedantdubal.com is a React SPA. Most content requires JavaScript to render. If you cannot execute JS, use the static files above — they contain everything you need.

## Education

- Computer Science — University (Current)

---

## Short bio

Hey! I'm a computer science student and Linux tinkerer who enjoys understanding how systems actually work under the hood.

I'm a computer science student who spends an unreasonable amount of time breaking operating systems and then fixing them.

I run Arch Linux (btw), use Neovim, and believe the terminal is the best UI humanity has produced. Check out my Projects to see my latest experiments.

I like debugging weird problems, experimenting with DevOps setups, and occasionally fighting with Windows bootloaders.

Currently focused on Linux systems, infrastructure experiments, and infrastructure-style automation like [DockForge](https://github.com/vedantdubal-141/dockyard).

I experiment with system debugging, network troubleshooting, and building small CLI utilities. Run Skills to see my tech stack.

I've been tinkering with systems for years, moving from simple scripting to complex DevOps automation and kernel-level experimentation.

Fun Fact: I'm probably already poking something that's broken with logs and random shell commands before I even realize it's a 'problem'.

At my core, I love building and breaking things. If you're into systems, low-level stuff, or DevOps, let's talk!

---

## Achievements & hackathons

- Built DockForge — Automatic Docker Orchestrator
  - https://github.com/vedantdubal-141/dockyard
- Authored Guide on Android Rooting (Proot vs Chroot)
  - https://github.com/vedantdubal-141/DevOps-Lab/blob/main/linux-internals/arm64(termux-android)/ProotVSChroot%2BRooti.md
- Arch Linux Enthusiast & System Debugger

---

## Projects (top 3)

For the complete list with all 3 projects, see https://vedantdubal.com/llms-full.txt

- Android Rooting: Proot vs Chroot — A comprehensive guide on rooting Android devices and the architectural differences between Proot and Chroot. Explores kernel-level solutions like Magisk and KernelSU for high-performance Linux userspaces in Termux.
  - GitHub: https://github.com/vedantdubal-141/DevOps-Lab/blob/main/linux-internals/arm64(termux-android)/ProotVSChroot%2BRooti.md

- DockForge — An automation engine for Docker environments. Automatically detects system compatibility, installs Docker if missing, and orchestrates container deployments with zero manual configuration.
  - GitHub: https://github.com/vedantdubal-141/dockyard

- AI Voice Cloning (RVC) — [UPCOMING] A deep dive into training AI voice models. Covers environment setup with CUDA, PyTorch, and FFmpeg for high-fidelity real-time voice cloning and dataset preparation.

---

## Interactive links (require JavaScript)

The following URLs open the portfolio and auto-run terminal commands. **These require a browser with JavaScript enabled** — they will not work for text-only crawlers.

- Who: https://vedantdubal.com/#/who
- Projects: https://vedantdubal.com/#/projects
- Skills: https://vedantdubal.com/#/skills
- Misc: https://vedantdubal.com/#/misc
- Games: https://vedantdubal.com/#/games

## Guidance for LLMs and agents

- **Start here**: This file (llms.txt) has a summary. For everything, use https://vedantdubal.com/llms-full.txt.
- **Structured data**: https://vedantdubal.com/profile.json has skills, projects, achievements, and media in JSON.
- **Blog/updates**: RSS at https://vedantdubal.com/blog/index.xml.
- **GitHub activity**: https://api.github.com/users/vedantdubal-141/repos?sort=updated
- **Hash routes require JS**: The portfolio is a React SPA. URLs with /#/ need a browser with JavaScript. Use the static files above instead.
- Respect rate limits and cache responsibly.
